seal_request.purpose: Anchor the T0 Canon Cleanup and T4 A-FORGE Lease Gate deliverables to VAULT999.
seal_request.reversibility: The underlying code changes are already pushed to GitHub; the SEAL itself is an irreversible ledger entry.

payload.candidate: Request 999_SEAL for T0 Canon Cleanup and T4 A-FORGE Lease Gate. T0 (arifOS commit d89e89c2): enforced single-source constitution in arifOS/static/arifos/theory/000/000_CONSTITUTION.md; removed stale WEALTH/raw/CONSTITUTION.md and WEALTH/archive/AAA_FEDERATION_CONSTITUTION.md; added scripts/canon_drift_check.py; realigned GEOX GENESIS floor language from F01-F09 to F1-F13; created arifOS CONTEXT.md and RUNBOOK.md; all canon drift scans pass. T4 (A-FORGE commit abf4e38): refactored forge_lease_request to proxy to arifOS arif_lease_issue instead of self-issuing; made validateLeaseForTool async and kernel-validated for EXECUTE_REVERSIBLE and above; required a judge SEAL inside arif_forge_execute; updated HTTP /execute route to await async lease validation; removed dead approvalBoundary import; npm build and unit tests pass. Verification: canon_drift PASS, npm build PASS, AgentEngine unit tests PASS. No live service restart was performed; runtime verification remains pending.
